title: Marksman Basket, Rattan, Brown, Large
features: STYLISH RATTAN DESIGN: Adds a modern touch to your garden, patio, or balcony.
DURABLE & WEATHER-RESISTANT: Made from high-quality plastic rattan, designed to withstand outdoor conditions.
LARGE 16-INCH SIZE: Provides ample space for a variety of flowers and plants.
STRONG & STURDY CHAIN: Comes with a robust hanging chain for secure placement.
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for flowers, herbs, trailing plants, and decorative greenery.
DRAINAGE SYSTEM: Built-in drainage hole prevents overwatering and root rot.
description: The Marksman 16” Rattan Hanging Basket is a stylish and practical choice for adding a touch of greenery to your garden, patio, balcony, or indoor spaces. Designed with a modern rattan finish, it blends seamlessly into any outdoor or indoor setting. The durable, weather-resistant material ensures long-lasting use, while the strong hanging chain provides stability and security. Perfect for flowers, herbs, and trailing plants, this spacious 16-inch planter offers plenty of room for lush, vibrant displays. Featuring a built-in drainage system, it promotes healthy plant growth by preventing water buildup and root rot. Easy to install and maintain, this hanging basket is a must-have for any plant lover.
